details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are all present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ is missing.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated directories found: moltbot/ (contains sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py), board/ (contains eod/out/ with archived JSON). Per MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md, shadow A/B modules are removed and v1 code paths MUST NOT be reintroduced.

Moltbot code/config found outside reports/audit and docs (excluded as documentation-of-removal): moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py (references moltbot). board/ directory contains archived Clawdbot-era JSON artifacts.
